name: writhing_stalker.live_door_light_escape_mcw
description: Live door/light escape row: light/focus escape-equivalent counterplay breaks pressure into withdraw/cooling rather than glued pursuit.

steps.label: post_load_door_light_escape_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: noon light/focus escape-equivalent fixture loads to live map

steps.label: audit_saved_noon_before_door_light_escape
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove expected time before live writhing-stalker window
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved turn proves local noon/bright escape footing

steps.label: audit_saved_writhing_stalker_before_door_light_escape
steps.abort_reason: saved active_monsters metadata did not contain required live-scenario footing
steps.expected_visible_fact: one hostile stalker starts with pressure footing before the light/focus escape check

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_door_light_escape
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off so the bounded live turn window is not consumed by warnings

steps.label: advance_door_light_escape_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: bounded live turn window runs after readable light/focus escape condition

steps.label: audit_writhing_stalker_door_light_escape_live_plan
steps.abort_reason: same-run artifact lacked withdraw/cooling lines after light/focus escape condition
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves the escape lever breaks pressure into withdraw/cooling

steps.label: audit_writhing_stalker_door_light_escape_no_strike
steps.abort_reason: stalker struck through the light/focus escape condition
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact does not contain forbidden magic-target or strike lines

evidence_contract.claim: readable light/focus escape counterplay breaks stalker pressure and forbids stale glued pursuit/strike
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for writhing-stalker live fun behavior
evidence_contract.writeback_note: No save/writeback gate: these scenarios prove bounded live-plan behavior from current-run logs plus saved start-state footing; persistent map mutation is not part of the product claim.
